name: Neon Open Source Program
description: Up to $5,000 in annual Neon credits for open source projects that use Postgres, plus cash payouts through GitHub Sponsorships and promotional support to Neon's 1M+ developer community.

perks.title: Annual Credits
perks.description: Up to $5,000 in Neon credits per year for serverless Postgres databases.

perks.title: Cash Referral Payouts
perks.description: $20 per developer who becomes a Neon customer through your referral link via GitHub Sponsorships.

perks.title: Promotional Support
perks.description: Exposure to Neon's 1M+ developer community through co-marketing and promotional campaigns.

eligibility: Project must use Postgres as a core component (database, extension, plugin, or workflow).
Must be publicly available under a recognized open source license and self-hostable.
Must provide documentation showing how to build with your software and Neon.
applicationProcess: Apply through the Neon Open Source Program page.
Neon typically responds within 1–3 business days.
After the first year, projects are reviewed for renewal based on progress and credit usage.
